{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 5.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 1.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:P/CR:X/IR:X/AR:X/MAV:X/MAC:X/MAT:X/MPR:X/MUI:X/MVC:X/MVI:X/MVA:X/MSC:X/MSI:X/MSA:X/S:X/AU:X/R:X/V:X/RE:X/U:X"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-gwfr-jfjf-92vv. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
A vulnerability was found in Grav CMS up to 1.7.49.5/2.0.0-beta.1. Affected by this vulnerability is the function FileCache::doGet of the file system/src/Grav/Framework/Cache/Adapter/FileCache.php of the component Cache Value Handler. The manipulation results in deserialization. The attack may be launched remotely. The attack requires a high level of complexity. The exploitation appears to be difficult. The exploit has been made public and could be used. Upgrading to version 2.0.0-beta.2 addresses this issue. The patch is identified as c66dfeb5f. The affected component should be upgraded.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j7rw-325j-2rmx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T21:57:13Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j7rw-325j-2rmx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j7rw-325j-2rmx"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-28T22:16:51Z", "published_at": "2026-04-29T00:30:23Z", "references": ["https://github.com/getgrav/grav/security/advisories/GHSA-gwfr-jfjf-92vv", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7317", "https://github.com/getgrav/grav/commit/c66dfeb5f", "https://github.com/devsamuelsantiago/grav-cms-filecache-object-injection", "https://vuldb.com/submit/798732", "https://vuldb.com/vuln/359965", "https://vuldb.com/vuln/359965/cti", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j7rw-325j-2rmx"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Grav has Insecure Deserialization in File Cache", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T21:57:14Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j7rw-325j-2rmx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.0.0-beta.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "getgrav/grav"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.0.0-beta.2"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-06T21:57:13Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: Grav has Insecure Deserialization in File Cache
